query:
UPDATE agent_sdk_tasks
SET
    kind = $2,
    status = $3,
    parent_id = $4,
    root_id = $5,
    depth = $6,
    thread_id = $7,
    submitted_input_json = $8,
    worker_id = $9,
    lease_id = $10,
    lease_expires_at = $11,
    last_heartbeat_at = $12,
    state_json = $13,
    attempt = $14,
    max_attempts = $15,
    last_error = $16,
    pending_child_count = $17,
    spawn_index = $18,
    result_payload = $19,
    created_at = $20,
    updated_at = $21,
    completed_at = $22,
    caller_metadata_json = $23,
    otel_traceparent = $24
WHERE id = $1
